name: Peanut Butter Chippies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, peanut butter, shortening, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg. Beat just until blended.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add to creamed mixture on low speed. Mix just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips and peanuts.
4. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop heaping teaspoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheet. Flatten slightly with the back of a spoon or hand.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time for 7 to 8 minutes, or until set and just beginning to brown. Do not overbake. Cool on baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing cookies to foil to cool completely.
Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
